zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Betrand de Rozel於大約1012年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親William Bertram de Russell de Rozel44歲，母親Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain44歲。他於1046年與Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1077年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rozel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Meyer, Shlomo, Chaya, Elihu, Hersh, Moshe, Shlomit, Tova, Uri, Zeev.
Jewish (Israeli): either an artificial name from Hebrew rozen ‘prince’, or a Hebraicized form of any original Ashkenazic surname beginning with Rosen- or Rozen-.

variants.name: Roznowski
meanings: Polish (Rożnowski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Rożnów, Rożnowo, or Rożnowa, named with the nickname Rożen (see Rozen ).

variants.name: Rosen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Emanuel, Isadore, Chaim, Yetta, Moshe, Velvel, Yosef, Chana.
Swedish (mainly Rosén): ornamental name composed of the elements ros ‘rose’ + the adjectival suffix -én/-en, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’. Compare Roseen and Rosene .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Betrand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French variant of   Bertram  , imported to Britain by the Normans. In modern times it has been made famous by the English philosopher  Bertrand Russell  (  1872–1970 ), but is only in occasional use.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Betrand de Rozel was born about 1012, in Normandy, France, his father, William Bertram de Russell de Rozel, was 44 and his mother, Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain, was 44. He married Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez in 1046, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1077, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Betrand de Rozel est né environ 1012, à Normandie, France, son père, William Bertram de Russell de Rozel, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez en 1046, à Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1077, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Betrand de Rozel um 1012 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bertram de Russell de Rozel 44 und seine Mutter Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain 44. Er hat 1046 in Normandie, Frankreich Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1077 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Betrand de Rozel è nato il circa 1012 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, William Bertram de Russell de Rozel, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez nel 1046, nel Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1077, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Betrand de Rozelが約1012年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父William Bertram de Russell de Rozelは44歳，母Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstainは44歳であった。1046年にフランスノーマンディでBaroness Adelaide de Cavanezと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1077年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Betrand de Rozel(이)가 대략 1012년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bertram de Russell de Rozel(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1046년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1077년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Betrand de Rozel nasceu aproximadamente 1012, em Normandie, França, seu pai, William Bertram de Russell de Rozel, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez em 1046, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1077, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Betrand de Rozel родился около 1012 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William Bertram de Russell de Rozel было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Gisela De Bostenburgh Turstain, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Adelaide de Cavanez в 1046 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1077 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
